brown_planthopper.damage_symptoms: Yellowing and drying of rice plants from base, hopperburn condition, honeydew secretion
brown_planthopper.life_cycle: Egg (7-9 days) → 5 nymphal stages (12-15 days) → Adult (15-20 days)

management.cultural: Avoid excessive nitrogen, maintain proper plant spacing, use resistant varieties
management.biological: Conserve natural enemies like spiders, mirid bugs, egg parasitoids

brown_planthopper.economic_threshold: 5-10 hoppers per plant at tillering stage

stem_borer.damage_symptoms: Dead hearts in vegetative stage, white heads at reproductive stage, silk threads and frass
stem_borer.life_cycle: Egg (5-7 days) → 5-6 larval stages (25-35 days) → Pupa (7-10 days) → Adult (5-7 days)
stem_borer.favorable_conditions: High humidity, lush vegetative growth, staggered planting

management.cultural: Synchronous planting, remove stubbles, avoid ratoon crop
management.biological: Egg parasitoid Trichogramma japonicum @ 50,000/ha, predatory birds

stem_borer.monitoring: Pheromone traps @ 8 traps/ha for monitoring adult moth activity
stem_borer.economic_threshold: 2% dead hearts at vegetative stage, 5% white heads at reproductive stage

gall_midge.damage_symptoms: Silver shoot formation, onion leaf symptom, stunted growth

management.cultural: Deep summer ploughing, avoid early planting, use resistant varieties

rhinoceros_beetle.damage_symptoms: V-shaped cuts on fronds, boring holes in unopened spear leaves, reduced nut production
rhinoceros_beetle.life_cycle: Egg (12-20 days) → 3 larval stages (60-120 days) → Pupa (14-21 days) → Adult (4-6 months)
rhinoceros_beetle.breeding_sites: Decaying coconut logs, manure pits, compost heaps, sawdust

management.cultural: Remove and destroy breeding materials, avoid fresh manure application
management.biological: Release Baculovirus oryctes, encourage natural enemies
management.mechanical: Hook out beetles from attacked palms, use light traps
management.chemical: Spray Carbaryl 0.15% on crown, soil application of Phorate 10G

rhinoceros_beetle.pheromone_traps: Use aggregation pheromone traps @ 1 trap per 2 hectares

red_palm_weevil.damage_symptoms: Yellowing of crown leaves, oozing of reddish brown liquid, hollow sound when tapped
red_palm_weevil.life_cycle: Egg (3-5 days) → 6-8 larval stages (35-60 days) → Pupa (14-21 days) → Adult (60-90 days)
red_palm_weevil.entry_points: Wounds, pruning cuts, leaf axils, growing points

management.prevention: Avoid injuries, proper pruning techniques, quarantine measures
management.curative: Injection of insecticide solution, removal of affected palms
management.chemical: Imidacloprid injection, trunk injection with Emamectin benzoate

red_palm_weevil.pheromone_traps: Ferrulure + food bait @ 1 trap per hectare

coconut_mite.damage_symptoms: Brown patches on immature nuts, distorted nut development, premature nut fall
coconut_mite.favorable_conditions: High humidity, protected locations under bracts

management.cultural: Remove affected nuts, maintain field sanitation

pollu_beetle.damage_symptoms: Boring holes in tender shoots, spikes, and leaves, stunted growth
pollu_beetle.life_cycle: Egg (7-10 days) → 3 larval stages (21-28 days) → Pupa (7-10 days) → Adult (30-45 days)
pollu_beetle.peak_activity: April-May and September-October coinciding with new shoot emergence

management.cultural: Remove and destroy affected plant parts, avoid overhead irrigation
management.biological: Conserve natural enemies, use entomopathogenic fungi

scale_insects.damage_symptoms: Yellowing of leaves, stunted growth, sooty mold development

management.cultural: Prune affected parts, improve air circulation
management.biological: Conserve lady bird beetles, parasitic wasps

symptoms.leaf_blast: Diamond-shaped lesions with brown borders and gray centers
symptoms.neck_blast: Brown to black lesions on neck node causing panicle breakage

management.cultural: Use resistant varieties, balanced fertilization, proper spacing
management.biological: Pseudomonas fluorescens, Trichoderma viride seed treatment

bacterial_blight.symptoms: Water-soaked lesions on leaf margins, yellowing and drying, kresek symptom
bacterial_blight.favorable_conditions: High humidity, temperature 25-34°C, wounds and injuries

management.cultural: Use certified seeds, avoid mechanical injuries, balanced nutrition

sheath_blight.symptoms: Oval to irregular lesions on leaf sheath, grayish-green with brown borders
sheath_blight.favorable_conditions: High humidity, dense plant stand, excessive nitrogen

management.cultural: Proper spacing, avoid excessive nitrogen, remove lower leaves
management.biological: Trichoderma viride, Pseudomonas fluorescens soil application

root_wilt.causal_organism: Complex of factors including fungi and mycoplasma
root_wilt.symptoms: Yellowing of outer whorl leaves, drooping, reduced nut size and yield

management.cultural: Improve drainage, organic matter addition, balanced nutrition
management.biological: Trichoderma viride, Pseudomonas fluorescens soil application
management.chemical: Aureofungin 2g + Neem cake 200g per palm, root feeding

root_wilt.prevention: Plant resistant varieties, ensure proper drainage, avoid waterlogging

bud_rot.symptoms: Rotting of growing point, foul smell, crown collapse

management.cultural: Improve drainage, avoid injuries to growing point
management.chemical: Remove rotten tissues, apply Bordeaux mixture paste
management.prevention: Proper spacing, avoid overhead irrigation of crown

leaf_spot.symptoms: Brown spots with yellow halos on leaves, premature leaf fall

management.cultural: Remove affected leaves, improve air circulation
management.chemical: Spray Propiconazole 25% EC @ 1ml/L, Copper oxychloride 50% WP

quick_wilt.symptoms: Sudden wilting of leaves, yellowing, vine death within days
quick_wilt.favorable_conditions: High soil moisture, poor drainage, warm temperature

management.cultural: Improve drainage, avoid waterlogging, use resistant varieties

anthracnose.symptoms: Dark brown circular spots on leaves and berries, premature fruit drop
anthracnose.favorable_conditions: High humidity, warm temperature, poor air circulation

management.cultural: Improve air circulation, avoid overhead irrigation

slow_wilt.symptoms: Gradual yellowing and wilting, stunted growth, reduced yield

management.cultural: Use nematode-free planting material, organic matter addition
management.chemical: Carbofuran 3G @ 40g per vine, Phorate 10G soil application

neem_oil.application: Spray during evening hours, repeat every 7-10 days

neem_seed_kernel_extract.preparation: 50g NSKE in 1 liter water, filter and spray
neem_seed_kernel_extract.effectiveness: Against sucking pests, leaf eating caterpillars

neem_cake.benefits: Soil conditioner, slow-release nitrogen, nematode control
neem_cake.frequency: Apply during manure application, 2-3 times per year

garlic_chili_extract.preparation: 100g garlic + 100g chili blended with 1L water, strain

tobacco_decoction.preparation: 100g tobacco waste boiled in 1L water for 30 minutes

trichoderma_viride.application_rate: 5g per kg seed for seed treatment, 5g per liter for foliar spray
trichoderma_viride.target_diseases: Soil-borne fungal diseases, root rot, wilt
trichoderma_viride.benefits: Disease suppression, plant growth promotion, induced resistance

pseudomonas_fluorescens.application_rate: 10g per kg seed, 5g per liter for soil drench
pseudomonas_fluorescens.additional_benefits: Plant growth promotion, induced systemic resistance

bacillus_thuringiensis.specificity: Specific to caterpillars, safe to beneficial insects

integrated_disease_management.principles: Combination of multiple strategies for sustainable disease management

strategies.genetic_resistance: Use of resistant/tolerant varieties as first line of defense
strategies.cultural_practices: Crop rotation, sanitation, proper spacing, balanced nutrition
strategies.biological_control: Use of beneficial microorganisms and natural enemies
strategies.chemical_control: Judicious use of fungicides as last resort

monitoring_and_forecasting.disease_surveillance: Regular field monitoring for early detection
monitoring_and_forecasting.weather_based_forecasting: Use weather parameters for disease prediction
monitoring_and_forecasting.action_thresholds: Economic threshold levels for decision making
